name: cytoscape-mcp
description: Connect Claude Desktop to Cytoscape Desktop to load, analyze, layout, and style biological networks using natural language.

CYREST_PORT.title: CyREST Port
CYREST_PORT.description: The port Cytoscape Desktop's REST interface is listening on. Default is 1234 — leave blank to use the default, or enter a different value if you have changed it in Cytoscape → Edit → Preferences → REST API.
